channel.title: byteFinancialiD
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from byteFinancialiD, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: 10 years of legged robots with Ghost Robotics at summit
item.description: CEO Gavin Kenneally will share lessons from a decade of deploying quadruped robots.

item.title: ABB Robotics launches PoWa cobot family for industrial tasks
item.description: New family of cobots addresses a gap between traditional cobots and industrial robots.

item.title: SS Innovations develops drone-based surgical robot
item.description: The SSi Vimana Aero aims to bring robotic surgery to wounded soldiers.

item.title: Accenture, Vodafone, SAP pilot humanoid robots in warehouse
item.description: Humanoids powered by Accenture's Robot Brain solution interact naturally with human operators.
